articles.title: Unchanged England opt to bowl in decider; India bring Gaud back
articles.description: Play was set to begin in cloudy yet bright conditions with no forecast for rain

articles.title: West Indies, Sri Lanka in high-stakes push to claim 2027 World Cup spot
articles.description: After recent struggles in major tournament qualification, both teams have plenty to play for in this ODI series

articles.title: Melbourne Stars and Renegades set to merge, second franchise to be sold in full
articles.description: The Stars' name and colours will be rebranded by CV; Renegades could play under caretaker administration in 2026-27

articles.title: Thunder confirm Flintoff as BBL coach in 'most significant off-field acquisition in club history'
articles.description: Thunder general manager Trent Copeland says Flintoff's "knowledge of Australian cricket and our Thunder program stood out during the process"

articles.title: Women's Champions Trophy 2027 moved from June to February
articles.description: ICC will also pilot a new version of the Women's Emerging Nations Trophy which will feature five Full Members and five Associate Members

articles.title: ICC approves red-to-pink ball change to reduce bad-light impact in Test cricket
articles.description: Both teams will have to agree to changing the ball from red to pink in case of bad light during a Test match

articles.title: Hetmyer 'reintegrated' into West Indies ODI squad with eye on 2027 World Cup
articles.description: Alzarri Joseph returns from injury while left-arm spinner Gudakesh Motie returns to the side

articles.title: Santner added to New Zealand Test squad to face England
articles.description: Spinning allrounder has completed recovery from shoulder injury, Foxcroft to return home

articles.title: Ambidextrous spinner Shashini Gimhani in Sri Lanka's T20 World Cup squad
articles.description: Chamari Athapaththu named captain of 15-member squad; set to play her tenth T20 World Cup

articles.title: England announce 12-man squad for first Test vs New Zealand, Shoaib Bashir and Ollie Robinson recalled
articles.description: England and New Zealand will face each other in a three-match Test series, starting on Thursday, June 4.

articles.title: Who is Sairaj Bahutule? All you need to know about India's newest spin-bowling coach
articles.description: Bahutule represented India in two Tests and eight One-Day Internationals and enjoyed a distinguished first-class career spanning nearly two decades.

articles.title: Sairaj Bahutule joins India's backroom setup as spin-bowling coach ahead of one-off Test against Afghanistan
articles.description: Bahutule joins the coaching team led by head coach Gautam Gambhir, along with Sitanshu Kotak (batting), Morne Morkel (fast bowling), T Dilip (fielding) and Ryan ten Doeschate (assistant coach).

articles.title: ‘ICC suspension was unexpected’ - Cricket Canada unveils reform plan & commits to full compliance
articles.description: The ICC suspended Cricket Canada's membership with immediate effect during its board meeting in Ahmedabad on June 1, citing serious breaches of the organisation's membership obligations.
